description: Add an emoji reaction to a message in a Slack channel, private channel, or direct message conversation.

channel.description: Channel ID containing the message (e.g. C1234567890).

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the message to react to, in format 1234567890.123456.

emoji.description: The name of the emoji to add as a reaction (without colons). Examples: 'thumbsup', 'heart', 'rocket', 'white_check_mark'.
